---
title: "Sword Fern Dieback Maps"
output: html_document
date: "2025-11-17"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(gghalves)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)
library(ggmap)
library(osmdata)
```


Note you can add 'keep_md:yes' to the YAML to save all r outputs as images. 

# Purpose

The purpose of this page is to generate maps of data used in analyses. 


# Wrangle

```{r}
setwd("~/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Core/Server Files/swordfern")
data <- read.csv("./data/lab/combined.results.csv")
```

```{r}
data <- rename(data,Tentative.Result = Tentative.Results..Internal.NCBI.Oomcycete.including.voucher.blast.)
```


```{r}
data <- data %>% filter(common_name=="western sword fern") %>% filter(!is.na(latitude))
```

```{r}
data$Tentative.Result[data$Tentative.Result=="Phytophthora europaea or abietivora?"] <- "Phytophthora sp."
data$Tentative.Result[data$Tentative.Result=="Phytophthora flexuosa?"] <- "Phytophthora sp."
```

```{r}
data <- data %>%
  mutate(Results.Neg = if_else(
    is.na(Tentative.Result) | Tentative.Result == "",
    "No Oomycete found",
    Tentative.Result
  ))

```


```{r}
Phytophthora <- data %>% filter(Genus=="Phytophthora") %>% droplevels()
```


```{r}
levels(as.factor(Phytophthora$Results.Neg))
```


```{r}
levels(as.factor(data$place_guess))
Seward <- data %>% filter(place_guess=="Seward Park, Seattle, WA, US") %>% droplevels()
```


# Map


```{r}
sewardbb <- c(left = min(Seward$longitude), 
                              bottom = min(Seward$latitude), 
                              right = max(Seward$longitude), 
                              top = max(Seward$latitude))
```


```{r}
seward.map <- get_map(sewardbb, zoom = 16, scale = 2, maptype="satellite",source="google")
```

```{r}
species.map <- ggmap(seward.map)+geom_point(data=Seward,aes(x=longitude,y=latitude,fill=Results.Neg),color = "black",pch=21, size = 3, alpha=0.9) + theme_minimal() +labs(title="Sword Fern Dieback Results",x="Longitude",y="Latitude",fill="Species") +theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = .5,face = "bold.italic")) + scale_fill_discrete(labels = function(x) parse(text = paste0("italic('",x, "')")))
```

```{r}
species.map
```






```{r}
databb <- c(left = min(Phytophthora$longitude), 
                              bottom = min(Phytophthora$latitude), 
                              right = max(Phytophthora$longitude), 
                              top = max(Phytophthora$latitude))
```


```{r}
data.map <- get_map(databb, zoom = 9, scale = 2, maptype="terrain",source="google")
```

```{r}
species.map <- ggmap(data.map)+geom_point(data=Phytophthora,aes(x=longitude,y=latitude,fill=Results.Neg),color = "black",pch=21, size = 3) + theme_minimal() +labs(title="Sword Fern Dieback Results",x="Longitude",y="Latitude",fill="Species") +theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = .5,face = "bold.italic")) + scale_fill_discrete(labels = function(x) parse(text = paste0("italic('",x, "')")))
```

```{r}
species.map
```


```{r}
syringaebb <- c(left = min(Phytophthora[Phytophthora$Tentative.Result=="Phytophthora syringae",]$longitude), 
                              bottom = min(Phytophthora[Phytophthora$Tentative.Result=="Phytophthora syringae",]$latitude), 
                              right = max(Phytophthora[Phytophthora$Tentative.Result=="Phytophthora syringae",]$longitude), 
                              top = max(Phytophthora[Phytophthora$Tentative.Result=="Phytophthora syringae",]$latitude))
```


```{r}
data.map <- get_map(syringaebb, zoom = 10, scale = 2, maptype="terrain",source="google")
```


```{r}
syringae.map <- ggmap(data.map)+geom_point(data=Phytophthora[Phytophthora$Tentative.Result=="Phytophthora syringae",],aes(x=longitude,y=latitude,fill=Tentative.Result),color = "black",pch=21, size = 3) + theme_minimal() +labs(title="Phytophthora syringae",x="Longitude",y="Latitude",fill="Species") +theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = .5,face = "bold.italic")) +guides(fill="none")

```

```{r}
syringae.map
```
